name: interlisted_name_mismatch
title: Interlisted Security Name Mismatch
description: Tests the interlist resolver by routing an order with a venue-specific symbol that maps to a different canonical name.
background: A client sends a NewOrderSingle for 'AAPL.TO' on XTSE, but the broker's internal routing resolves it incorrectly to a different security or fails to find the venue mapping. This tests the InterlistResolver's ability to correctly map AAPL → AAPL.TO for XTSE, resolve RY across three venues (NASDAQ/XTSE/XETR), and handle edge cases where a symbol exists on one venue but not another.

steps.action: Verify all known interlisted mappings are loaded
Route order for AAPL.TO target venue XTSE
steps.expected_state: Resolver returns AAPL for NASDAQ; AAPL.TO for XTSE; is_interlisted(AAPL) = true

steps.action: Route order for RY target venue XETR
Attempt to resolve non-existent symbol XYZ.L for XLON
steps.expected_state: Resolver returns original symbol unchanged; is_interlisted(XYZ.L) = false

steps.action: Verify interlist resolver handles case-insensitive input
steps.expected_state: aapl, AAPL, Aapl all resolve to same canonical
